task_description: Remove the docs app. None of the docs are relevant, the build doesn't really work, and I'll start a new docs app later

patterns.workspace_pattern: npm workspaces monorepo with packages/* glob pattern
patterns.removal_pattern: Remove package from workspaces array, delete directory, clean node_modules
patterns.verification_pattern: Grep for @create-studio/docs to ensure no cross-package dependencies

existing_implementations.description: Monorepo with 4 packages: app, docs, shared, widgets. Docs is isolated with no dependencies from other packages.

investigation_findings.no_cross_dependencies: Verified that app, widgets, and shared packages do NOT depend on @create-studio/docs
investigation_findings.isolated_package: Docs package runs on port 3002 and is completely isolated
investigation_findings.ci_workflow: GitHub workflow nuxthub-cs-docs.yml deploys docs package to NuxtHub
investigation_findings.workspace_scripts: Root package.json has dev:docs, build:docs, test:docs scripts to remove
investigation_findings.no_typescript_paths: Root tsconfig.json has no path mappings for docs package
